name: Curry Soup Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Thin fresh wheat noodles (Chinese-style, preferably with egg)
1/2 lb Chopped chicken meat (preferably dark meat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 3 quarts of salted water to a boil. Add noodles and stir to separate strands. Bring water to a second boil and cook for 30 seconds longer.
2. Pour noodles into a colander. Rinse thoroughly with running cold water. Drain. Shake off excess water. Distribute among 4 small soup bowls.
3. In a saucepan, heat the oil and add the garlic. Gently sauté until lightly browned.
4. Add the Simple Red Curry Paste. Sauté for a minute.
5. Increase to medium-high heat and add the thick coconut cream. Stir continuously until the cream reduces and becomes oil.
6. Add chicken; sauté lightly and break up the lumps.
7. Add medium coconut milk, chicken stock, curry powder, turmeric, fish sauce, and sugar. Simmer for 5 minutes.
8. Add the cabbage and cook for 30 seconds longer.
9. Just before serving, add lemon juice. Pour the soup over the noodles. Top with green onions. Serve hot with a squeeze of lemon juice.
